blended.narrative: Mont-Sainte-Anne is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,354 ft. Looking ahead, 48 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
